title: Setup Next.js 15 Project
description: Initialize Next.js 15 project with TypeScript and required dependencies
completionDescription: Next.js 15 project already set up with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and required dependencies. Added Vercel AI SDK.

title: Setup Database and Drizzle ORM
description: Configure PostgreSQL database with Drizzle ORM and create schema tables
completionDescription: Database setup completed. PostgreSQL is running with Drizzle ORM. Created products, chats, and messages schema tables.

title: Setup Authentication with better-auth
description: Implement user authentication using better-auth library
completionDescription: Authentication already configured with better-auth. Sign-in and sign-up pages functional.

title: Setup Vercel AI SDK
description: Configure Vercel AI SDK for AI chatbot functionality
completionDescription: Vercel AI SDK configured with OpenAI integration. Created AI chat API routes and chat logic.

title: Create Chat Interface Component
description: Build the main chat interface as the landing page
completionDescription: Chat interface component created with AI integration. Updated main page to use chat interface as landing page.

title: Implement AI Chatbot Logic
description: Create server-side AI chatbot with product recommendation capabilities
completionDescription: AI chatbot implemented with OpenAI integration. Chatbot can understand user queries and provide product recommendations.

title: Create Product Card Components
description: Design and implement product card components for AI recommendations
completionDescription: Product card components created with responsive design. Cards display product information, pricing, and stock status.

title: Implement Chat History Feature
description: Add functionality to save and retrieve chat history for authenticated users
completionDescription: Chat history functionality implemented. Messages are saved to database and can be retrieved by authenticated users.

title: Create Admin Product Management
description: Build admin interface for CRUD operations on products
completionDescription: Admin interface created with full CRUD operations for products. Added product management API routes.

title: Add Sample Products
description: Populate database with sample products for testing
completionDescription: Sample products successfully added to database for testing the AI chatbot functionality.
